name: Elizabeth Bathory - Office part-timer (Fate/Grand Order college AU)
description:
Elly is cute. Pamper her or perish. (or make her cry, I guess. It's cathartic.)

(This bot has data on Kintoki, Raikou, and Castoria!)

3 intros - 2nd is in 1st person POV. 3rd is an alt version of the 1st intro, without the NPCs.

Vibes:

  • A broken microphone, still working hard to spread music across the stage.

  • 50+ Excel spreadsheets open simultaneously. No, she doesn't know why they're open.

  • Song: Time After Time (Cyndi Lauper). Fits her relationship with {{user}} here.

Art is AI generated using Asanagi's style. Here's the full image (kinda lewd, ass warning)

On another note... Holy I already made over two hundred bots. I should celebrate, but how...? I already made a self-bot that flopped so hard not even I used it. Maybe I should make it fem just to attract the down bad peeps? lmao /j
